channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live updates: Ceasefire disintegrates as Trump says US will reinstate blockade of Iranian ships in Strait of Hormuz - CNN
item.description:
1. Live updates: Ceasefire disintegrates as Trump says US will reinstate blockade of Iranian ships in Strait of Hormuz  CNN
  2. Trump proposes 20% toll on cargo through Strait of Hormuz; restarts Iran blockade  CNBC
  3. Trump’s Threat to Impose Fees in the Strait of Hormuz Contradicts His Aides  The New York Times
  4. Trump says U.S. military will reimpose blockade on Iranian ports  The Washington Post
  5. US to take over Strait of Hormuz, charge 20 percent fee for cargo shipped through, Trump says  Politico

item.title: America’s Latest Weapon Against Iran: Sea Drones - WSJ
item.description:
1. America’s Latest Weapon Against Iran: Sea Drones  WSJ
  2. In a first, US military used seaborne drones in attack on Iran port  The Hill
  3. U.S. launches new strikes on Iran and Tehran attacks U.S. allies in the Gulf  NPR
  4. Iran Live Updates: After Intense U.S. Strikes, Iran Targets Gulf States and Claims Strait is Closed  The New York Times
  5. U.S. and Iran exchange strikes as Strait of Hormuz standoff escalates  CNBC

item.title: Ukraine and 9 other countries announce a coalition to protect Europe from ballistic missiles - AP News
item.description:
1. Ukraine and 9 other countries announce a coalition to protect Europe from ballistic missiles  AP News
  2. Ukraine updates: 'Coalition of the willing' meeting in Paris  dw.com
  3. Ukraine and nine other countries announce a coalition to protect Europe from ballistic missiles  kare11.com
  4. Anti-ballistic coalition to meet in France to support Ukraine's homegrown 'Freya' air defense project  The Kyiv Independent
  5. Ukraine to present its anti-ballistic programme at Paris meeting today, Zelenskyy says – Europe live  The Guardian

item.title: Children's social media curbs planned across EU, von der Leyen says - Reuters
item.description:
1. Children's social media curbs planned across EU, von der Leyen says  Reuters
  2. Europe Takes Step Toward Possible Social Media Ban for Children  The New York Times
  3. Von der Leyen convinced by case for age restrictions on social media  Euronews.com
  4. EU Proposal to Curb Minors’ Access to Social Media Coming Later This Year  WSJ
  5. EU chief pledges social media ban to protect children from ‘predatory algorithms’  The Guardian

item.title: UK counter-terrorism police take over investigation into murder of former minister Widdecombe - Reuters
item.description:
1. UK counter-terrorism police take over investigation into murder of former minister Widdecombe  Reuters
  2. Counter terrorism police take over investigation into Ann Widdecombe's death  BBC
  3. Mahmood offers Farage security meeting after Ann Widdecombe’s death  The Guardian
  4. UK counter-terror police lead investigation into suspected murder of former lawmaker Ann Widdecombe  CNN
  5. Suspect in former U.K. minister’s killing rearrested on suspicion of terror  NBC News

item.title: France to summon Russia's ambassador over "sabotage and espionage in a dozen European countries" - CBS News
item.description:
1. France to summon Russia's ambassador over "sabotage and espionage in a dozen European countries"  CBS News
  2. Russian Cyberattacks Stretching Back 15 Years Prompt European Sanctions  WSJ
  3. EU and Britain target Russian intelligence officers over a major cyberspying campaign  AP News
  4. France set to summon Russian ambassador to Paris over alleged cyberattack campaign  Reuters
  5. EU sanctions nine people over alleged Russian cyber-spying campaign  Al Jazeera

item.title: Inaccessible Exits and Flammable Foam Made Bangkok Bar Fire Deadly - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Inaccessible Exits and Flammable Foam Made Bangkok Bar Fire Deadly  The New York Times
  2. Fire breaks out at a pub in Bangkok, killing at least 27 people  CNN

  4. 'No way out': Survivors describe deadly Bangkok bar inferno  Reuters
  5. Bangkok pub fire kills 27, wounds dozens: What we know  Al Jazeera

item.title: Musicians, DJ among 10 dead after plane crashes in the Bahamas - USA Today
item.description:
1. Musicians, DJ among 10 dead after plane crashes in the Bahamas  USA Today
  2. 10 killed, including popular Bahamian band, in small plane crash, officials say  CBS News
  3. Bahamas plane crash that killed 10 included musicians and a DJ, union says  AP News
  4. Beloved musicians among victims in deadly Bahamas plane crash; aviation authority grounds flights  Fox News
  5. Popular band, DJ among 10 killed in fiery plane crash: ‘This is a painful moment’  AL.com

item.title: Iran-backed Houthis accuse Saudi Arabia of striking Yemen’s international airport - AP News
item.description:
1. Iran-backed Houthis accuse Saudi Arabia of striking Yemen’s international airport  AP News

  4. Houthis accuse Saudi Arabia of striking Sanaa airport, vow retaliation  Reuters

item.title: Inside Israel’s Secret Operation to Cultivate Ahmadinejad - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Inside Israel’s Secret Operation to Cultivate Ahmadinejad  The New York Times
  2. Israel courted Iran’s former hardline president for post-regime role, reports claim  The Guardian
  3. Former Iranian president Ahmadinejad under arrest by IRGC for work with Mossad  The Jerusalem Post
  4. Report: Ahmadinejad met Mossad chief under Israeli plan to install him as Iran leader  The Times of Israel
  5. Inside the Mossad Plot to Install Israel's Arch-enemy Ahmadinejad as Iran's Leader  Haaretz

item.title: UK bans support for two Iranian groups over antisemitic attacks in Britain - Reuters
item.description:
1. UK bans support for two Iranian groups over antisemitic attacks in Britain  Reuters

item.title: Japan is building a new intelligence agency with help from the West - The Japan Times
item.description:
1. Japan is building a new intelligence agency with help from the West  The Japan Times

  4. Decades Of Silence, Then $407 Million Answer: Japan Is Building A Spy Agency  NDTV
  5. $407m to end 'spy paradise': Japan enlists Western allies for first intelligence agency in 80 years  upday News

item.title: Wildfire of "exceptional scale" burning near Paris - CBS News
item.description:
1. Wildfire of "exceptional scale" burning near Paris  CBS News

item.title: Toronto police looking for suspects after deadly shooting at festival - NPR
item.description:
1. Toronto police looking for suspects after deadly shooting at festival  NPR

item.title: Ukraine Strikes Russian Oil Depot Again as Drone Attacks Reach Moscow, Killing 3 - Kyiv Post
item.description:

item.title: Sheikh Hamad: The Arab leader who broke Israel’s siege on Gaza - Al Jazeera
item.description:

  4. Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies aged 74  BBC

item.title: Heat Waves in Europe Linked to Thousands of Excess Deaths - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Heat Waves in Europe Linked to Thousands of Excess Deaths  The New York Times
  2. Europe recorded 10,000 excess deaths during late-June heatwave, data show  Reuters
  3. Germany records nearly 100 drowning deaths, many of them young men, in June heatwave  The Guardian
  4. Too Hot: Scorching Record-Breaking Heatwaves Across Europe In Photos  Forbes
  5. June heatwave set record temperatures in Germany  Yahoo
